allow: PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8081/art-gallery/admin/artists?action=add" -UseBasicParsing -SessionVariable s -MaximumRedirection 0 -ErrorAction Stop; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)`nContent length: $\($r.Content.Length\)`nContains artist_form: $\($r.Content -match 'artist_form'\)`nContains adm-form: $\($r.Content -match 'adm-form'\)`nView attribute: $\(if\($r.Content -match 'Unknown view: \(.+?\)\\.'\){ $Matches[1] } else { 'N/A' }\)" } catch { "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $session = New-Object Microsoft.PowerShell.Commands.WebRequestSession; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8081/art_gallery/admin/artists?action=add" -UseBasicParsing -WebSession $session -MaximumRedirection 5 -ErrorAction Stop; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\), Length: $\($r.Content.Length\)"; if\($r.Content -match 'artist_form'\) { "Contains: artist_form" }; if\($r.Content -match 'adm-form'\) { "Contains: adm-form \(the add form\)" }; if\($r.Content -match 'Manage artists'\) { "Contains: Manage artists \(the list view\)" }; if\($r.Content -match 'Unknown view'\) { "Contains: Unknown view debug message" }; if\($r.Content -match 'login'\) { "Contains: login \(redirected to login\)" } } catch [System.Net.WebException] { $resp = $_.Exception.Response; if\($resp\) { "HTTP $\([int]$resp.StatusCode\)" } else { "No response" } })
